name: claude-starter-kit
description: A starter kit for people new to Claude Code. Sets up a clean hub-and-spoke workspace, builds a personal master prompt, manages NotebookLM notebooks, and guides you step by step.

plugins.name: starter-kit
plugins.description: Get a great Claude Code workspace in one prompt. Scaffolds a hub-and-spoke folder structure with sensible conventions, then bundles skills for building your master prompt, managing NotebookLM, and getting hand-held through any process.
